rawAssistant: Traveler, I'm but a humble keeper of tales and warnings in this wild land. What brings you to our doorstep, seeking guidance on the whispers from Hollowfen's lowlands? The mist has lifted, revealing signs that hint at secrets worth uncovering, but beware, for the truth can be as treacherous as the road itself.
